table-744-744.pgTitle: Superhero Moral Alignment and Publishing Statistics
table-744-744.caption: What is the percentage of superheroes who act in their own self-interest or make decisions based on their own moral code? Indicate how many of the said superheroes were published by Marvel Comics.
data: Driven by personal ethics, even if unconventional.
Actions benefit the many, even at personal cost.
Adheres strictly to rules and moral codes.
